name: buildestate-real-estate-platform
description: AI-powered real estate platform with multi-source property search, scraping 99acres, MagicBricks, and Housing.com using Firecrawl API

scripts.install-all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:admin
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:admin
scripts.setup: npm run install-all && npm run copy-env
scripts.copy-env: cp backend/.env.example backend/.env && cp frontend/.env.example frontend/.env && cp admin/.env.example admin/.env
scripts.update-all: cd backend && npm update && cd ../frontend && npm update && cd ../admin && npm update
